title: T-024 — UI: FA Production tab + ProdDetail rows editor (fa_production_tab)
prompt:
# T-024 — FA Production tab UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §5.6, §6.1 Chain 2/4 + UX fa_production_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:571-653 (fa_production_tab)

## Goal
Production tab rendering ProdDetail rows table (one per component) with manufacturing_operation_1..4 dropdowns from Reference.ManufacturingOperations, intermediate_code_p1..final read-only auto, line+equipment_setup linked dropdowns.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/production-tab.tsx 'use client'. Reads prod_detail rows + Reference operations via Server Component prefetch. Each row uses RHF subform; on operation change calls updateProdDetailCell which invokes chain2. Auto cols green readOnly. Single Save All button submits dirty rows in single tx.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/production-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/__tests__/production-tab.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/actions/update-prod-detail-cell.ts [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the tab renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:571-653 (fa_production_tab), then it shows same row structure (4 op dropdowns + yields + line + equipment_setup + intermediate codes), auto cols read-only green, and uses shadcn Table+Select+Input primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given user changes manufacturing_operation_1, when saved, then chain2 cascade fills intermediate_code_p1
3. Given user changes line, when saved, then chain1 fills equipment_setup automatically

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests for parity, chain2 trigger, chain1 trigger
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test production-tab'

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass per-row RBAC
- Do not allow editing intermediate_code_* fields
- Do not duplicate cascade logic in client

pipeline_inputs.description: Production tab editor for ProdDetail rows with operation dropdowns + line/equipment_setup cascade.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity: same row structure with 4 op dropdowns, yields, line, equipment_setup, intermediate codes; auto cols green readOnly; shadcn Table+Select+Input only. updateProdDetailCell action triggers chain2 + chain1 server-side.
out_of_scope: Do not handle multi-component sync UI here (covered by chain3 in core tab)

Given user changes manufacturing_operation_1, when saved, then chain2 cascade fills intermediate_code_p1
Given user changes line, when saved, then chain1 fills equipment_setup automatically
test_strategy: RED: 3 RTL tests for parity, chain2 trigger, chain1 trigger before component exists
risk_red_lines: Do not allow editing intermediate_code_* fields
